final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input in,
    output reg out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
    begin
        if (rst)
            out <= 0;
        else
            out <= in >> 1; // Divide by 2 by shifting right
    end
endmodule
